tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-issues (linear_issues))
(def in-progress-issues (filter #(= "in_progress" (:state %)) all-issues))
(def assignee-counts (group-by :assignee in-progress-issues))
(def max-count-key (max-key count assignee-counts))
(def person (first max-count-key))
(def count (count max-count-key))
{:person person :count count}"}
